chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1240 of 2019 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5060/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 27.09.2023 Syed Israr Ahmed Shah associate of Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
